title: secretx-cache: implement CachingStore
description: Implement TTL-based in-memory cache wrapping any SecretStore. CachingStore<S: SecretStore> holds Arc<S>, a Duration TTL, and Mutex<HashMap<String, CachedEntry>>. CachedEntry holds SecretValue and the Instant it was fetched. get() returns cached value if within TTL, otherwise fetches from inner store and caches result. refresh() bypasses cache, fetches fresh, updates cache. On TTL expiry, old SecretValue is zeroed before replacement. Default TTL: 5 min for network backends; 0 (no cache) for file/env. Required by secretx-bitwarden and secretx-doppler. Depends on secretx-core.
